leadText: Jalapeño (Japanese: ハラペーニョ Jalapeño) is a type of ingredient introduced in Generation IX.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] It can be used as an ingredient in making a sandwich .

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S V A very spicy ingredient—so spicy as to leave no room for ambivalence about it. You either like it or you don't.
